description: Fetch an Azure DevOps pull request (Git REST 7.1). Set include_threads to also return PR comment threads. When the workbench URL is bare https://dev.azure.com, pass organization; if the URL is https://dev.azure.com/{organization}, organization may be omitted.

organization.description: Azure DevOps organization name (required when API root has no organization path segment).

repository.description: Git repository name or ID (GUID) within the project.

pull_request_id.description: Pull request id (numeric id from the PR URL or API, not the merge commit).

include_threads.description: When true, also fetch pull request comment threads (includes thread id and per-thread comment ids).
